title: Create Little Sorcery
description: Do you like Create? And want little sorcery? Now, try this project! Main about Create 6.0.0+ and Ars Nouveau, also build on NeoForge 1.21.1 !
body:
Do you like Create? And want little sorcery? Now, try this project! Main about Create 6.0.0+ and Ars Nouveau, also build on NeoForge 1.21.1 !
First,this project use Create 6.0.0+ to improve your gaming experience,and many new Create's addons are also very interesting.[Create's introduction.](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
![A Create windmill structure.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d2d4beba98cc9670f536d06a7aff53dcb27ef61.jpeg)
Second,we use Ars Nouveau to give you a gaming experience infused with Sorcery.[Ars Nouveau's introduction.](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-nouveau)
![A player using magic.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aea721f283d8f739a7ba877e9cc5e79334bb8a3a.png)
Moreover,colorful ecosystems and intricate structures ensure your journey is never dull again!
![A grove of birch trees.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a093f2729282f2f5c46c361cac64bce9e74d2758.jpeg)
![A ship structure.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc492f5108b1bea90d642a3e27b4a3e2b101210b.jpeg)
We have made special optimizations for the survival mode. The epic Celtic-style background music will make your journey more exciting. The airplanes that can be built in the early stage will make it easier for you to explore the unknown.And now you can also teleport around the world without cheating!
![A player flying a plane towards a floating ship structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f17dea1332b62a3a4a1cdcea2078adf21bdecab.jpeg)
![A waystone.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e78df47bac065b342f1008006af329f4056a6844.jpeg)
Are you ready? Let's start our journey in the new world!To the future!
